scope: Headless GUT shutdown after all project tests. Raw counts include Godot-held global script classes; they may only be recalibrated after an audited pinned GF vendor-tree or project runtime class-set change, and must not grow while both inputs remain unchanged.
calibration_reason: The audited startup and feedback overhaul adds BootRuntime, GameDiagnosticsInstaller, RuntimeDiagnosticsUtility, BoardFeedbackCanvas, and GameplayVisualWarmup as five intentional project runtime script classes. Three complete 285-test runs produced the same Godot 4.7/GUT shutdown counts; the product-only subset exited below the previous limits, and review-only records now load with CACHE_MODE_IGNORE. The expanded script and headless UI assertion set therefore recalibrates only ObjectDB, dummy texture, and shaped-text debt; resource and font limits remain unchanged.
